title: poivrea intermedia
side_effects: Poivrea intermedia can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and swelling. Ingesting the plant's toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's oils may cause headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. In severe cases, improper use of Poivrea intermedia can also result in seizures, coma, or even death.
